name: Performance optimization Q1
description: Reduce load times from 10s to under 2s. Customers losing deals due to slow app.

description: 60% of usage is mobile. Need native iOS app to improve retention.

description: New users spend 2+ hours learning. Implement guided tour and help docs.

name: Slack integration beta

name: Fix data sync issues
description: Dashboard analytics 15-20% off from source. Blocking enterprise sales.
